subtitles.original: シナリオ通りのカルマ
subtitles.english: Karma according to the scenario

subtitles.original: 飛び越えてきた人生
subtitles.english: A life leaped over and crossed

subtitles.original: 望みがなくなって
subtitles.english: With all hope completely gone,

subtitles.original: 愛だけ残ったの
subtitles.english: only love has remained.

subtitles.original: それぞれの幸せ振りかざしても
subtitles.english: Even if we brandish our respective happiness,

subtitles.original: 倒れないふたりで立っていようね
subtitles.english: let's stand together as two who won't fall.

subtitles.original: 鮮やかでいてね
subtitles.english: Please remain vivid,

subtitles.original: そのまままでいてね
subtitles.english: please stay just as you are.

subtitles.original: 消えない幻
subtitles.english: A phantom that will never fade.

subtitles.original: 夢幻クライマックス
subtitles.english: Dreaming Climax,

subtitles.original: 最後の夜 エンドレスを刻め斬新に
subtitles.english: on this final night, engrave the endless novelty.

subtitles.original: 抱きしめても壊れないくらい
subtitles.english: Hold me so tight that I won't break,

subtitles.original: 強く、なりすぎたから
subtitles.english: because I have become far too strong.

subtitles.original: あなたはわかんない
subtitles.english: You just don't understand

subtitles.original: おかえりからの孤独
subtitles.english: the loneliness after saying "welcome home."

subtitles.original: それでも無神経に
subtitles.english: Even so, with complete apathy,

subtitles.original: 季節が巡っていく
subtitles.english: the seasons keep revolving.

subtitles.original: いつも褒めてくれた 叱ってくれた
subtitles.english: You always praised me, you scolded me.

subtitles.original: きっと楽になるし 寂しくなるね
subtitles.english: I'm sure things will get easier, but I'll miss you.

subtitles.original: 忘れないでいてね
subtitles.english: Please don't forget me,

subtitles.original: 憧れていてね
subtitles.english: please keep admiring me.

subtitles.original: 朽ちない面影
subtitles.english: An imperishable vestige.

subtitles.original: だからディスティニー 時を超えて
subtitles.english: So it's destiny, transcending time,

subtitles.original: 同じ地球 踏んでいられるわ
subtitles.english: that we can stand on the same Earth.

subtitles.original: 魂だけ 側に置いてね
subtitles.english: Just keep your soul by my side,

subtitles.original: 強く生きていけるの
subtitles.english: so that I can live on strong.

subtitles.original: 夢幻クライマックス
subtitles.english: Dreaming Climax,

subtitles.original: 最後の夜
subtitles.english: on this final night,

subtitles.original: エンドレスを刻め
subtitles.english: engrave the endless...

subtitles.original: 斬新に 抱きしめても壊れないくらい
subtitles.english: novelty, so tight that I won't break,

subtitles.original: 強く、なりすぎた
subtitles.english: because I have become too strong.

subtitles.original: さみしい
subtitles.english: I'm lonely...

subtitles.original: だからディスティニー 時を超えて
subtitles.english: So it's destiny, transcending time,

subtitles.original: 同じ地球 踏んでいられるわ
subtitles.english: that we can stand on the same Earth.

subtitles.original: 魂だけ 側に置いてね
subtitles.english: Just keep your soul by my side,

subtitles.original: 強く生きていこうな
subtitles.english: let's live on strong.

subtitles.original: はい。ということで、
subtitles.english: Well then,

subtitles.original: ゲストパート見ていただきましたが、いかがだったでしょうか？
subtitles.english: you've just watched the guest section, how did you like it?

subtitles.original: 本当にね、あの、ゲストの人とこういうことやりたい！っていうのを
subtitles.english: We really got to realize our wish to do

subtitles.original: 実現させていただきましたー！
subtitles.english: something like this together with the guests!

subtitles.original: 皆さん、出演ありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much to everyone for appearing!

subtitles.original: はい。詳しくはですね、明日の振り返り配信で
subtitles.english: Yes. For more details, in tomorrow's review stream,

subtitles.original: 色々ね、裏話だったりとかをお話しさせていただこうかなと思いますので、ぜひ振り返り配信も来てください。
subtitles.english: I'll talk about various behind-the-scenes stories, so please watch the review stream too!

subtitles.original: そして、
subtitles.english: And next,

subtitles.original: いかがですか？新衣装は！いかがでしょうか？可愛いでしょ？
subtitles.english: how do you like my new outfit? What do you think? Pretty cute, right?

subtitles.original: たくさん、あの差分があったんですけど気づきましたか？まあ、気づきますよね。
subtitles.english: There were many differences, did you notice? Well, of course you did!

subtitles.original: 最初は白い衣装から始まりまして、
subtitles.english: We started off with the white outfits,

subtitles.original: そして「うまぴょい伝説」ではですね、あの黒いパンツ姿で階段から、あそこの階段から登場したんですけれども、
subtitles.english: and then for "Umapyoi Densetsu," I appeared from the stairs over there in black pants.

subtitles.original: 最初、みんな「あれ？ルイどこ？」みたいな、
subtitles.english: At first, everyone was like, "Wait, where is Lui?"

subtitles.original: 感じになってて面白かったんですけど。
subtitles.english: It was really funny to see.

subtitles.original: なんかね、ウマ娘を知っている人は「まあ、あそこから来るんやろうな」ってなんか、後方腕組みしてたのがまた面白かったですね。
subtitles.english: It was also funny how those who know Uma Musume folded their arms knowingly, thinking, "Well, she's probably coming from there."

subtitles.original: はい。えー、この後ですね、えー、21時20分から、
subtitles.english: Yes. And next, after this, starting at 21:20,

subtitles.original: メンバー限定で撮影会もございますので、
subtitles.english: we'll have a members-only photoshoot session,

subtitles.original: そちらもぜひ、色んな差分を見せていきたいなと思いますので、撮影会もぜひ来ていただけたら嬉しいでございます。
subtitles.english: where I want to show you different variations, so I'd be happy if you could come join the photoshoot!

subtitles.original: はい。えー、重大発表はですね、この後、2曲あるんですけど、
subtitles.english: Also, we have two more songs left,

subtitles.original: えー、今から歌う曲の後で、えー、発表させていただきますので、ぜひ皆さん、ちょっと心待ちにしていただけたらなと思います。
subtitles.english: and I will make a major announcement after the next song, so please look forward to it!

subtitles.original: はい。えー、じゃあ次の曲はですね、鷹嶺ルイ・セカンドアルバム『ラピスラズリ』から1曲歌わせていただきます。
subtitles.english: Alright, for the next song, I'll sing a track from Takane Lui's second album, "Lapis Lazuli."

subtitles.original: 「抗う君への鎮魂歌」です。お願いいします。
subtitles.english: It is titled "Requiem for You Who Resist." Please enjoy.

subtitles.original: 抗う君への鎮魂歌
subtitles.english: [Title: Requiem for You Who Resist]

responses.thoughts:
**Subtitle Generation Analysis**

Okay, here's the breakdown of my process for generating subtitles from the video, a performance of "Dreaming Climax" and Takane Lui's speech.

First, I identified the video segment as the entire video from 00:00 to 05:04.794. Then, I needed to figure out what was happening and when, focusing on the lyrics, and then any on-screen text or speech. I started by getting the lyrics' start/end timings.

I analyzed the timestamps and compared it to a reference file, if the reference file was not accurate, I listened to the audio and transcribed what I heard. I then translated the lyrics into English. After that I identified that Takane Lui started speaking at 02:56.000, so I needed to also transcribe and translate what she said in Japanese from 02:56.000 to 04:47.000. Lastly, at 05:00.500 to 05:04.794 there was on-screen text, which was a song title, so I needed to translate it.

I made sure each timestamp matched the start and end of each sentence, I cross-checked that the translations were accurate, and that each line fit within the character limit. I listened very carefully to make sure the timings are correct for the words and sentences. I re-listened several times to be sure. After that, I double-checked everything to make sure the data was in the right format. After confirming everything, I am ready to output the subtitles.
